name: KSHV_miRNA_cluster
description: KSHV encodes 12 pre-miRNAs (miR-K12-1 through miR-K12-12) clustered in a ~4 kb intronic region between K12/kaposin and ORF71/vFLIP. Twelve mature miRNAs (some plus star strands) target host immune and apoptosis pathways (BCLAF1, TWEAKR, MICB, etc.). Hairpin secondary structures conserved across KSHV strains; short reads with mismatches near hairpin loops require lambda-aware error tolerance.
